Track 4 hour FVGs and that provides a great filter for range of movement if trading on a 1 -5 min tf. Opening range trades will usually either breakout or return to the other side so if there are higher tf FVGs nearby price can ping between them and provide whippy conditions. 
Also depends on the market - NQ on a1 min can displace and rarely retest range - and you will miss out - FTSE more likely to retest on a 5 min
